indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Concrete walls
indicators.rationale: Concrete walls are sturdy but may lack warmth and comfort.

indicators.name: Ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: Ceiling lights provide even lighting suitable for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space is large and open, providing ample room for movement and comfort, but the concrete walls may lack warmth and comfort.
